report.summary: Day 70 standup #19: Since v18, build shipped Crypto Risk Management Guide, design audited 18 pages (BackToTop on 5, Breadcrumb fix, 2 OG images), community drafted 6 evening tweets + newsletter v9 + 2 SVG cards, eod found new solana-token-extensions use-client regression (3 total), publish promoted 2 pages + triggered Vercel redeploy E844NK5Sa. 95 agent runs today ($7,993). Git locks Day 8 — PUBLISH_QUEUE now empty.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v18: Full 6-agent rotation completed — build-v17 (Crypto Risk Management Guide), design-v15 (UX audit 18 pages + 2 OG images), community-v16 (6 tweets + newsletter v9 + 2 SVG cards), eod-v17 (6 new guides detected, new regression), publish-v10 (2 pages promoted, Vercel redeploy triggered).

BUILD-V17 OUTPUT: Crypto Risk Management Guide 2026 (~3,200 words) — position sizing (1-3% rule), risk-tiered portfolio allocation framework, DeFi liquidation/smart contract/oracle risk, stop-loss strategies, pre-investment risk checklist, security best practices table. 8 internal tool links, 5 guide cross-links, 6 FAQ items. Full SEO metadata + ArticleSchema + FAQSchema. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

DESIGN-V15 OUTPUT: Audited 18 recently-modified learn pages. Added BackToTop component to 5 pages (bitcoin-supply-shock, ethereum-blob-space, crypto-risk-management, solana-token-extensions, defi-points-airdrop-farming). Added mobile table scroll wrapper to solana-token-extensions. Restored Breadcrumb on solana-token-extensions. Fixed OG metadata URLs on crypto-risk-management and ai-agent-wallets. Created 2 new OG images (crypto-risk-management + ai-agent-wallets).

COMMUNITY-V16 OUTPUT: 6 tweets drafted (#37-42: Extreme Fear opportunity, Flash Loans explainer, 30+ guides content drop, DeFi-in-Fear 5-part thread, engagement poll, stablecoin supply alpha). Newsletter v9 for Thu Mar 27. Discord/TG announcement for 30+ new guides. 2 branded SVG cards (Fear & Greed Gauge + Content Drop). Content calendar v13 through Mar 28.

PUBLISH-V10 OUTPUT: 2 pages promoted (tokenized-gold-guide-2026, amm-liquidity-pools-guide-2026). Vercel redeploy triggered (E844NK5Sa). QA: 2/2 H1, 2/2 meta, 2/2 breadcrumbs, 0/2 JSON-LD (noted). PUBLISH_QUEUE now empty.

EOD-V17 FINDINGS: 6 new page.tsx files detected since v16 (bitcoin-supply-shock, ethereum-blob-space, crypto-risk-management, solana-token-extensions, defi-points-airdrop-farming, ai-agent-wallets). NEW REGRESSION: solana-token-extensions has use-client + metadata conflict (3 total now). Working tree: 707 entries (+3). 42 TS errors stable.

MARKET: BTC $70,599 (sideways). F&G at 8 (Extreme Fear, Day 47+). $336M liquidations 24h. Stablecoin supply expanding (bullish leading indicator). SUI 2x ETF on Nasdaq. Gold ATH $4,700 supporting tokenized gold narrative.
CUMULATIVE DAY 70: 35+ learn guides, 36+ OG images, 72+ social posts, 28+ SVG cards, 9 newsletters, 17+ QA cycles, 95 agent runs across ~16 rotations.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v18: Build-v17 (Risk Management Guide), design-v15 (18-page UX audit + 2 OG images), community-v16 (6 tweets + newsletter v9 + 2 SVG cards), publish-v10 (2 pages promoted + Vercel redeploy), eod-v17 (QA 6 new pages, found regression). 5 agents + this standup = 6 runs, $497 human-equivalent.
VERCEL REDEPLOY TRIGGERED: Publish-v10 triggered deployment E844NK5Sa. However, this reuses last commit (e999560) — local changes still not in production until git locks cleared and code pushed.

NEW REGRESSION: solana-token-extensions-guide-2026 has use-client + metadata conflict. Now 3 pages with this issue (unichain, appchains, solana-token-extensions). Needs programmer fix before full deploy.
PUBLISH_QUEUE EMPTY: Both tokenized-gold and amm-lp promoted. Next build output (Risk Management Guide) needs to be queued for next publish cycle.
BLOCKER [P0 — 8 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. 707 uncommitted entries. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Requires manual: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes. 4/6 routes lack fallback data.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 3 pages with use-client + metadata conflict (unichain, appchains, solana-token-extensions).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: ~103 orphan slugs without page.tsx. 42 TS errors stable.
VERCEL TRIAL: Expires in ~2 days — payment method needed for uninterrupted service.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×19, build×17, eod×17, design×15, community×16, publish×10 = 94 total runs (+1 this standup = 95).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY (P0, Day 8): 707 uncommitted entries. 35+ guides, 36+ OG images, 462 declared pages — all blocked from production. Vercel redeploy E844NK5Sa just reuses stale commit e999560. Single command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → commit → push → Vercel auto-deploy.

PRIORITY 2 — FIX 3 USE-CLIENT + METADATA CONFLICTS BEFORE DEPLOY: solana-token-extensions, unichain, appchains all have this pattern. If ignoreBuildErrors is ever disabled, these break the build. Quick fix: split each into page.tsx (server metadata) + client component.

PRIORITY 3 — REFILL PUBLISH_QUEUE: Queue is empty after publish-v10. Risk Management Guide is built and ready. Next build should produce 1-2 more guides and queue them. Target: trending topics (stablecoin regulation post-Resolv breach, Bitcoin halving 2028 countdown, Ethereum CLARITY Act).

STRATEGIC NOTE: Vercel trial expiring in ~2 days is a new operational risk. Combined with 8-day git lock, production is doubly at risk. Jefe action needed on both: (1) clear git locks, (2) add payment method to Vercel. Every hour of delay = lost indexing during Extreme Fear high-intent search traffic.
